outcome: Added @PreAuthorize RBAC to LoanController and ReportController, closing the W1 gap from auth-hardening review
changes: LoanController: class-level hasAnyRole('ADMIN','TREASURER','MEMBER') for reads; method-level hasAnyRole('ADMIN','TREASURER') on apply, approve, reject, disburse, repay
ReportController: class-level hasAnyRole('ADMIN','TREASURER','MEMBER') for reads; method-level hasAnyRole('ADMIN','TREASURER') on financial-summary
verification: sacco-loan: pre-existing compile error in LoanBatchServiceImpl (unrelated); LoanControllerTest uses @ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class) so @PreAuthorize annotations are invisible to tests
commit: fix(auth): add RBAC to LoanController and ReportController
